modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Cannot open any PDFs in Adobe Acrobat Pro on Windows.

full_description_text:  
The user is experiencing an issue where Adobe Acrobat Pro fails to open any PDF files. This problem occurs on a Windows environment, preventing access to important documents. The inability to open PDFs is impacting the user's workflow and productivity.
